AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY RYAN, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIS-BOOKER, KA'MARI (DRIVER ) JOHNSON, MARSHA (OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RYAN, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLIS-BOOKER, KA'MARI (DRIVER ) JOHNSON, MARSHA (OWNER) $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $255.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,255.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNT. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SUSAN RYAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KA'MARI ELLIS-BOOKER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARSHA JOHNSON AKA STARVEINA MARSHA JOHNSON IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
